description: A sunlit outdoor scene showing a group of about twelve children and a woman (the teacher) gathered around a large table set for a birthday celebration under the shade of a tree. A brass samovar sits prominently at the center of the table. The children, ranging in age, are dressed in colorful rural Russian clothing — blues, reds, whites, and florals. Some drink from cups, others eat, and one boy at the left appears to be praying or blowing on his tea. The teacher smiles warmly from behind the samovar. The garden setting is lush and green, with dappled sunlight filtering through the tree canopy.
